commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cf2a50ee32aad152f3a126dc5c4b2d2ccbc2db94)
commands.review_summary:
Adds an upstream response `error` listener in `src/proxy-capture/proxy-server.ts` and a proxy test for an origin that destroys the response socket.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +78. Total +98 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible with medium confidence: current main reads from `upstreamRes` without an `error` listener, and Node throws on unhandled EventEmitter `error` events. I did not run a full real proxy repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor/human follow-up is needed because automation cannot supply the contributor's real-environment proof, and the patch also needs a small status/test correction before merge.

target.title: fix(proxy): add error handler on upstream response stream
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
